case_title: CORBEN, DARRELL M.D. VS LOGAN, DEAN et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY CORBEN, DARRELL M.D. AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, DEAN AARON KENNY AND ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEAN LOGAN C/O OF AARON KENNY AND ASSOCIATES RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORBEN, DARRELL M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AARON KENNY AND ASSOCIATES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $421.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
